---
title: "Student Productivity and Digital Distraction"
categories: [Work in Progress, Students]
image: DSCF1029.png
---

I've acquired this free data set named [Student Productivity & Digital Distraction Dataset](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/sehaj1104/student-productivity-and-digital-distraction-dataset?select=student_productivity_distraction_dataset_20000.csv) from Mansehaj Preet in kaggle.


```{r include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE) 
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, fig.width = 20, fig.height = 10)

#Load CSV file
stupro <- read_csv("student_productivity_distraction_dataset_20000.csv")
```



```{r echo=FALSE}
head(stupro)

```



```{r echo=FALSE}


```



```{r echo=FALSE}


```



```{r echo=FALSE}


```



```{r echo=FALSE}


```
